segments.text:
Synthesis of Alkenes from an Alcohol
CHEM-C 343
Fall 2020

Our first reaction in the lab!
FAQs
What are the dangers of sulfuric acid (H 2 SO 4 )?
Why use a Teflon boiling chip?
How does this reaction work anyway?
Help! This is an equilibrium reaction and my solvent is also a product! How do I get the reaction to make product?
What’s the point of the beaker of ice? It seems like a lot of work.
What techniques will we use to isolate and clean up the product?
What is the maximum amount of product I could expect to make?
How will I know I actually made alkenes? And in what proportions?
Will you really be that upset if someone submits an aqueous sample for GC analysis?
